findings.title: Ingress Reconnaissance Exposure
findings.signature: Repeated port scan activity against exposed services
findings.recommended_patch: Harden ingress ACLs, restrict management ports, and rotate exposed service bindings.
findings.generated_patch:
# Patch plan for vuln-1: Ingress Reconnaissance Exposure
# Severity: medium
def apply_patch(control_plane):
    control_plane.enable_guardrail('vuln-1')
    control_plane.enforce('Harden ingress ACLs, restrict management ports, and rotate exposed service bindings.')
    return 'patched'
